title: gavilea macroptera
intro: Gavilea macroptera is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, native to New Zealand. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Maori medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Gavilea macroptera include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
